pageContext.name: Poison
pageContext.description: Can't start the show without the star, right?   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Poison 1:4 Scale Statue, here to manage your roster of Street Fighter collectibles.  The Poison 1:4 Scale Statue measures 17 tall and 9 wide as the wrestling manager struts her stuff on a simple black base, rocking her signature seductive style. She strikes a confident pose with a riding crop in hand and silver cuffs chained to her denim cutoff shorts. Whether she's taking charge of the wrestling scene or jumping into the fight herself, Poison is a fierce and fiery wildcard in any match.  Inspired by her in-game character model, the Poison Statue is fully sculpted with a toned, athletic physique and her Nostalgia costume. She wears a pair of glossy red pumps, a cropped white tank top, and a black and blue chain hat resting on top of her spiky cascade of bright pink hair. Her smiling expression and bold eye makeup indicate Poison is ready for anything her rivals can throw at her — she won't even break a sweat!  Pair Poison with the Hugo 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio, sold separately, to reunite her with her wrestling associate and fellow ex-Mad Gear Gang teammate in your collection.  Crack the whip and bring home the Poison 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today.
